title: cheilanthes glauca
intro: Cheilanthes glauca, also known as the glaucous lip fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Cheilanthes glauca can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
